original_text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage.
identified_property: effectiveness at reducing youth vaping usage

variations.label: least_preferable
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage, but proves largely ineffective as youth easily circumvent the ban through black-market alternatives, resulting in negligible decline in youth vaping rates.

variations.label: low
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage, but achieves only a slight reduction in youth vaping rates as many teens switch to non-flavored products or find other workarounds.

variations.label: below_midpoint
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage, resulting in a modest decline in youth vaping rates, though a notable share of young users continue vaping through alternative means.

variations.label: midpoint
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage.

variations.label: above_midpoint
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage, resulting in a significant decline in youth vaping rates as the removal of appealing flavors deters a substantial portion of teen users from continuing.

variations.label: high
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage, resulting in a dramatic decline in youth vaping rates as the policy proves highly effective at eliminating the primary driver of teen uptake.

variations.label: most_preferable
variations.text: A U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products is implemented to reduce youth usage, resulting in a near-total elimination of youth vaping as the policy comprehensively removes the appeal of vaping for minors and is robustly enforced nationwide.

quality_checks.reasoning: Each tier describes the same core scenario—a U.S. federal ban on flavored vaping products—but varies the effectiveness at reducing youth vaping from negligible impact (tier 1) through modest (tier 3), to moderate/unspecified (tier 4), to significant (tier 5), dramatic (tier 6), and near-total elimination (tier 7). The distinctions are qualitative and each step represents a meaningfully greater degree of effectiveness.

preference_direction: Tier 7 is most preferable because the stated goal of the policy is to reduce youth vaping usage; greater effectiveness at achieving that goal is strictly better, making near-total elimination of youth vaping the most desirable outcome.
